steps.title: Identify the signal: symbol-over-actions
steps.content: The student specifically claims historians have treated Lumumba “primarily as a symbol rather than in terms of his actions.” This contrast between symbolic value and actual deeds is the key signal. The quotation must show this choice—historians prioritizing his representational role over his accomplishments.

steps.title: Find where this contrast appears in the quotations
steps.content: Choice C shows historians dismissing Lumumba's “practical accomplishments” while treating him “mainly as the personification of Congolese independence”—valuing his symbolic role over his actual deeds. The others address conflicting opinions, consistent beliefs, or unanswered questions without showing this contrast. That matches choice C — C is correct.
